memberdef.argsstring: (std::shared_ptr< crdt::GlobalDB > db, std::shared_ptr< crypto::Hasher > hasher, const std::string &net_id)
memberdef.name: KeyValueBlockHeaderRepository

parameterdescription.para: - a blake2_256 hash of an SCALE encoded block header

simplesect.para: the number of the block with the provided hash in case one is in the storage or an error

parameterdescription.para: - the number of a block, contained in a block header

simplesect.para: the hash of the block with the provided number in case one is in the storage or an error
block header with corresponding id or an error

parameterdescription.para: of a block which status is returned

simplesect.para: status of a block or a storage error

node.label: std::map< CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

childnode.edgelabel: < CID, std::pair< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode >, std::list< CID >::iterator > >

node.label: std::map< CID, std::set< std::pair< CID, std::string > > >
std::map< CID, std::tuple< std::shared_ptr< Subscription >, std::shared_ptr< std::promise< std::shared_ptr< ipfs_lite::ipld::IPLDNode > > > > >
